examples: I'll be teaching history and sociology next term.
Simpson's much vaunted discoveries are in fact commonplace in modern sociology.
This degree offers a major specialization in social policy alongside a course in sociology.
Confidence in the Japanese economy soared in the 1980s on the strength of Japan's business sociology.
Her mother, sociology professor Dolores Pereira Coutinho, 50, campaigned for months before taking legal action.
